promptText:
Detailed Description: A man dressed in a red plaid shirt and a dark vest walks steadily along a rocky alpine trail, his long shadow stretching out beside him in the warm afternoon light. He moves with a quiet confidence across the rugged terrain, surrounded by the immense scale of a vast mountain range. The camera smoothly tracks forward towards the man with a smooth, steady motion, capturing the grandeur of the layered peaks and deep, forested valleys that fade into a hazy horizon. As the camera pans, it reveals a beautiful mountain vista with soft clouds drifting gently across the sky, adding subtle movement to the majestic and serene landscape, all shot in a beautiful 35mm film style that emphasizes the natural textures and deep focus of the scene.

Background: Immense, jagged mountain peaks stretch across the horizon, their forms layered and softened by atmospheric haze under a sky of gently drifting clouds.

Middleground: The hiker, a bearded man in a beanie, walks along the crest of a ridge dotted with small pine trees that overlook a deep, expansive valley below.

Foreground: The rocky, uneven trail crunches under the man's boots, with low-lying alpine shrubs and stones casting sharp textures in the golden afternoon sun.
